stemHtml: A pilot is being radar vectored in controlled airspace below the Minimum Safe Altitude (MSA) but above the Minimum Vectoring Altitude (MVA). The temperature is ISA -10°C. Who is responsible for terrain separation and what should the commander do?

options.a: ATC is responsible and commander should reject instruction if it is dangerous, because temperature below ISA.
options.b: Commander is responsible for terrain separation and commander should accept.
options.c: ATC is responsible and commander should always accept.
options.d: Commander is responsible and commander should always accept.
